stemHtml: What method does a radio altimeter use to calculate height ?

options.a: by calculating the time it takes for a continuously transmitted VHF signal to travel to the surface below and return
options.b: by referencing VHF communication signals from ground stations
options.c: by setting QFE instead of QNH as the standard pressure reference
options.d: by measuring the frequency difference between a continuously transmitted radio wave and the reflected signal from the surface below
